title: Worker outputs localhost URL instead of configured domain
symptom: The worker outputs URLs pointing to 'localhost:5678' instead of the configured domain, causing issues with webhooks and SMTP approval buttons.
not_this_if: URLs are correctly pointing to the configured domain
root_cause: The worker nodes are not inheriting the URL-related environment variables from the main n8n service, leading to default localhost URLs being used instead of the intended domain.
fix_steps: Open the Docker Compose file for the n8n setup.
Add the URL-related environment variables (N8N_PORT, N8N_PROTOCOL, WEBHOOK_URL) to the worker nodes.
Restart the Docker containers to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Duplicate the URL-related environment variables in the worker nodes' configuration.
